idle: The bread is better on the far corner.
Sit, sit — the shade is here.
god: That is not a man. Look at it.
My grandmother spoke of these. I did not believe her.
reckless: Are you blind? People walk here!
Slow down, you son of a dog!
challenge: Enough. You will stop this now.
You bring this to our street? No.
warn: Last warning, stranger. Turn around.
Do not make me. Please.
triumph: The street remembers your face now.

idle: Ah-ah, this heat today, eh.
My friend, you owe me since Tuesday o.
gunfire: No be play be this — move!
flee: Leave am, leave am, we dey go!
god: God abeg. What is that thing?
Nobody told me the sky people are real.
reckless: You wan kill person? Oya reverse!
Are you mad? Watch your front!
challenge: You don do. Stop am now now.
Not for this street, my friend. No.
warn: I dey warn you well well. Go back.
Try am. Just try am one time.

idle: Ja, the taxi is late again, hey.
Shame, look at this weather.
gunfire: No man, not here. Get down.
flee: Just leave it, we go now.
god: That, my friend, is a big problem.
I have never seen such a thing. Never.
reckless: Hey wena! Watch where you drive!
You nearly got me, boet. Slow down.
challenge: No. That is enough now.
Not on my street, china. Stop.
warn: I am asking you nicely. Once.
Turn around. I will not say it again.
triumph: You picked the wrong street, boet.

idle: Arre, the chai is finished already?
One minute, one minute, I am coming.
flee: Leave the shop, just leave, go!
god: Bhagwan. That is no ordinary man.
I am telling you — the old stories are true.
reckless: Oye! Are you driving with eyes closed?
Slowly, slowly! People are here, na!
challenge: Bas. Enough now. You stop.
Not in this gali, my friend. No.
warn: I am warning you. Once only.
Go back now. Please, I am saying nicely.
engage: Come then! For the whole colony!
triumph: Stay down. It is over, na.

idle: The line for noodles is too long today.
Did you see the news this morning?
god: That is not human. Do not look at it.
The reports were true. It is real.
reckless: Hey! Watch the road!
You almost hit me — slow down!
challenge: Stop. That is enough.
Not here. Not on this street.
warn: I am telling you once. Leave.
Please. Turn back now.

idle: Ay, mira, the coffee is cold again.
Oye, primo, you saw the game?
god: Madre de Dios. What IS that?
My abuela warned me. She was right.
reckless: Oye! You almost kill me, cabrón!
Despacio! There are people here!
challenge: Ya. That is enough, hombre.
Not on my block. No, señor.
warn: Te lo digo una vez. Go.
Do not make me. I am asking.
triumph: This barrio knows your face now.

idle: The trains, again, honestly.
Another grey morning. Wonderful.
god: That is... that is not possible.
So the broadcasts did not exaggerate.
reckless: Imbécile! Watch where you drive!
Slow down — this is not a track!
challenge: No. This ends. Now.
Not in this quarter. Stop.
warn: I will say it once. Leave.
Turn around. Do not test me.
triumph: We do not forget faces here.

idle: Cold today. Colder tomorrow.
The kiosk is out of everything, of course.
flee: Leave it. It was never yours. Go.
god: So. The monsters are real. Good.
My father would have laughed. Then run.
reckless: Blind, are you? Watch the road!
Slow, idiot. People here.
challenge: Enough. You stop. Now.
Not this street. No.
warn: I warn you one time. Go.
Turn back. I am not joking.

idle: Bloody hot one today, mate.
Servo was out of pies again, typical.
flee: This way, come on, leg it!
god: Yeah, nah, that’s not right at all.
Reckon the telly wasn’t having us on then.
reckless: Oi! Watch it, ya galah!
Slow down, mate, people here!
challenge: Right. That’s enough of that.
Not round here, mate. Pack it in.
warn: Fair warning. Rack off.
Don’t make me, mate. Last chance.

idle: Ô, meu, the bus is never coming.
Viste el partido? Increíble.
god: Nossa. What in God’s name is that?
Mi abuelo lo dijo. He was right.
reckless: Ô meu, quase me mata! Devagar!
Cuidado! There are people, che!
challenge: Chega. That is enough.
No en mi barrio. Stop.
warn: Te aviso uma vez. Go.
Do not force me. Por favor.
triumph: Fica no chão. It is over.

idle: Wah gwaan, di patty shop open yet?
Bwoy, di heat a nuh joke today.
flee: Lef it, jus lef it, mek we go!
god: Jah know. Wah kinda ting dat?
Di old people did warn we. A true.
reckless: Ey! Yuh nearly mash me up!
Slow down, yout — people deh yah!
challenge: Nuh more a dat. Stop it now.
Not pon dis corner. No sah.
warn: Mi a warn yuh one time. Gwaan.
Nuh mek mi. Mi a beg yuh.
triumph: Di corner nah forget yuh face.

idle: The tea has gone cold, as always.
You heard? They say prices rise again.
gunfire: In the name of God — take cover!
god: This is beyond men. Look at it.
The prophets spoke of such days.
reckless: Have you no eyes? People walk here!
Slower! This is no place to race!
challenge: That is far enough now. Turn back.
Not upon our street. Enough.
warn: I warn you but once. Depart.
Do not compel me. I ask you.
triumph: Your face is known to us now.
